languages.text: Wielder and their allies gain {uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of Burning and Bleeding. They always fail tests to remove Burning and Bleeding. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage as fire damage, {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% as rending damage and gain {uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% additional critical strike chance.

traits.locale_text: Wielder and their allies gain {uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of Burning and Bleeding. They always fail tests to remove Burning and Bleeding. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage as fire damage, {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% as rending damage and gain {uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% additional critical strike chance.

languages.text:
The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and always fail {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
! Can only be used once per combat.

Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% critical hit chance.

The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and always fail {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.

The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of burning and bleeding and always fail tests to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional fire damage equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and rending damage equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% critical hit chance.

languages.text:
Владелец и его союзники получают {uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} уровней {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горения{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечения{/g} и всегда проваливают {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверки{/g} на снятие этих эффектов. Пока на такого персонажа действует и горение, и кровотечение, он наносит дополнительный {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}огненный урон{/g}, равный {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% от нанесенного, и {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}раздирающий урон{/g}, равный {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% от нанесенного, а также получает +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% к {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}шансу критического попадания{/g}.
! Может использоваться только 1 раз за бой.
languages.original_text:
The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and always fail {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
Владелец и его союзники получают {uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} уровней {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горения{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечения{/g} и всегда проваливают {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверки{/g} на снятие этих эффектов. ! Может использоваться только 1 раз за бой.

Владелец и его союзники получают {uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} уровней {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горения{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечения{/g} и всегда проваливают {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверки{/g} на снятие этих эффектов. Пока на такого персонажа действует и горение, и кровотечение, он наносит дополнительный {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}огненный урон{/g}, равный {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% от нанесенного, и {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}раздирающий урон{/g}, равный {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% от нанесенного, а также получает +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% к {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}шансу критического попадания{/g}.
! Может использоваться только 1 раз за бой.

languages.text:
El portador y sus aliados ganan +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} niveles de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}sangrado{/g} y siempre fallan cualquier {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g} para eliminar estos efectos. Mientras sufran quemadura y sangrado, sus armas infligen {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}daño por fuego{/g} adicional igual al {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % del daño infligido y {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}daño acerado{/g} igual al {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % del daño infligido. Además, ganan +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % de {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}probabilidad de impacto crítico{/g}.
! Solo puede usarse una vez por combate.
languages.original_text:
The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and always fail {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
El portador y sus aliados ganan +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} niveles de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}sangrado{/g} y siempre fallan cualquier {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g} para eliminar estos efectos. Mientras sufran quemadura y sangrado, sus armas infligen {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}daño por fuego{/g} adicional igual al {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % del daño infligido y {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}daño acerado{/g} igual al {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % del daño infligido. Además, ganan +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % de {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}probabilidad de impacto crítico{/g}.
! Solo puede usarse una vez por combate.

languages.text:
Der Träger und seine Verbündeten erhalten +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} Stufen {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Verbrennen{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Bluten{/g}. Alle ihre {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Proben{/g} zur Entfernung dieser Effekte misslingen. Sind sie mit Verbrennen und Bluten belegt, verursachen ihre Waffen zusätzlichen {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}Feuerschaden{/g} in Höhe von {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % des verursachten Schadens und {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}Rüstungsbrechenden Schaden{/g} in Höhe von {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % des verursachten Schadens. Außerdem erhalten sie +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}Kritische Trefferchance{/g}.
! Kann nur einmal pro Kampf eingesetzt werden.
languages.original_text:
The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and always fail {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
Der Träger und seine Verbündeten erhalten +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} Stufen {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Verbrennen{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Bluten{/g}. Alle ihre {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Proben{/g} zur Entfernung dieser Effekte misslingen. Sind sie mit Verbrennen und Bluten belegt, verursachen ihre Waffen zusätzlichen {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}Feuerschaden{/g} in Höhe von {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % des verursachten Schadens und {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}Rüstungsbrechenden Schaden{/g} in Höhe von {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % des verursachten Schadens. Außerdem erhalten sie +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}Kritische Trefferchance{/g}.
! Kann nur einmal pro Kampf eingesetzt werden.

languages.text:
L'utilisateur et ses alliés reçoivent +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Combustion{/g} et de {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Saignement{/g}. De plus, ils échouent toujours aux {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} permettant de supprimer ces effets. S'ils sont sous l'effet de Combustion et de Saignement en même temps, leurs armes infligent des {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}dégâts de feu{/g} supplémentaires égaux à {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % des dégâts infligés et des {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}dégâts de lacération{/g} égaux à {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % des dégâts infligés. Ils gagnent également +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % de {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}chances de coup critique{/g}.
! Utilisable une fois par combat.
languages.original_text:
The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and always fail {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
L'utilisateur et ses alliés reçoivent +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Combustion{/g} et de {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Saignement{/g}. De plus, ils échouent toujours aux {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} permettant de supprimer ces effets. S'ils sont sous l'effet de Combustion et de Saignement en même temps, leurs armes infligent des {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}dégâts de feu{/g} supplémentaires égaux à {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % des dégâts infligés et des {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}dégâts de lacération{/g} égaux à {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % des dégâts infligés. Ils gagnent également +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} % de {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}chances de coup critique{/g}.
! Utilisable une fois par combat.

languages.text:
Kullanan kişi ile dost birimleri, +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanma{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}kanamaya{/g} maruz kalır. Bu etkileri kaldırmak için yapılan {g|Encyclopedia:Test}testlerde{/g} her daim başarısız olurlar. Hem yanıp hem kan kaybederken silahları, verilen hasarın %{uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} kadarına eşit ilave {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}ateş hasarı{/g} ve verilen hasarın %{uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} kadarına eşit ilave {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}yırtma hasarı{/g} verir. Ayrıca +%{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş olasılığı{/g} kazanırlar.
! Her çatışmada sadece bir kez kullanılabilir.
languages.original_text:
The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and always fail {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanan kişi ile dost birimleri, +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanma{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}kanamaya{/g} maruz kalır. Bu etkileri kaldırmak için yapılan {g|Encyclopedia:Test}testlerde{/g} her daim başarısız olurlar. Hem yanıp hem kan kaybederken silahları, verilen hasarın %{uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} kadarına eşit ilave {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}ateş hasarı{/g} ve verilen hasarın %{uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} kadarına eşit ilave {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}yırtma hasarı{/g} verir. Ayrıca +%{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş olasılığı{/g} kazanırlar.
! Her çatışmada sadece bir kez kullanılabilir.

languages.text:
装备者及其盟友受到{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}级{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}流血{/g}效果，且移除这些效果的{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}必定失败。同时处于燃烧和流血状态时，其武器额外造成已造成伤害{uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}%的{g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}火焰伤害{/g}和已造成伤害{uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}%的{g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}撕裂伤害{/g}。此外，其{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击率{/g}提高{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}%。
！此能力每场战斗只能使用一次。
languages.original_text:
The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and always fail {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
装备者及其盟友受到{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}级{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}流血{/g}效果，且移除这些效果的{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}必定失败。同时处于燃烧和流血状态时，其武器额外造成已造成伤害{uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}%的{g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}火焰伤害{/g}和已造成伤害{uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}%的{g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}撕裂伤害{/g}。此外，其{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击率{/g}提高{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}%。
！此能力每场战斗只能使用一次。

languages.text:
装備者とその味方は{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}レベル分の{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃焼{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}出血{/g}の両方が付与され、これらの効果を解除する{g|Encyclopedia:Test}試み{/g}は常に失敗する。燃焼と出血中は、武器が与えたダメージの{uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}%の{g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}火ダメージ{/g}と{uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}%の{g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}裂傷{/g}ダメージを付与する。さらに、{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカルヒット率{/g}が+{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}%上昇する。
! 1戦闘につき1回のみ使用可能。
languages.original_text:
The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and always fail {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
! Can only be used once per combat.

! 1戦闘につき1回のみ使用可能。
